summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upgraded BioLens app with Supabase integration, barcode scanning, petroload meter, and share functionality. Backend APIs 100% functional including new barcode lookup endpoint. Frontend successfully integrated with Supabase RPC, all major user flows working including search, results display with petroload visualization, share cards, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) - 200 OK
Backend barcode lookup endpoint (POST /api/barcode/lookup) - Successfully resolves UPC barcodes via UPCitemdb
All material search endpoints working correctly
Homepage loads with hero section, search bar, Scan Product button, and 6+ example search chips
Search bar accepts input and navigates to /results?q=query correctly
Example search chips navigate to results page (poly hoodie, bamboo sheets, pet bottle tested)
Supabase integration via search_biolens_scan() RPC working correctly
Results page for 'bamboo sheets' shows: Transition Material, Medium risk, Petroload 42/100, Bamboo Viscose material
Results page for 'polyester hoodie' shows: Petro-Based, High risk classification
Results page for 'pet bottle' shows: Petro-Based, High risk classification
Petroload arc meter renders correctly with 0-100 scale and color-coded labels
Confidence badges display correctly (Strong Match, Verified, etc.)
Share Card modal opens with material name, petroload, alternatives, and BioLens branding
Share Card modal has Share, Download, and Story Format buttons - all functional
How It Works page navigation and loading successful
Explore Materials page loads 29 materials from backend API
Explore Materials filter buttons work (All, Petro-Based, Plant-Based tested)
Navbar links work correctly (Home, Explore Materials, How It Works)
Mobile hamburger menu opens and displays navigation links
Mobile responsive design working correctly
Back button functionality from results page works
